input.content:
name: environment-matrix-generator

# Trigger on the usual events, plus workflow_dispatch so the harness can pick
# the fixture file at runtime via the MATRIX_FIXTURE env var.
on:
  push:
  pull_request:
  schedule:
    - cron: "0 6 * * 1"
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      fixture:
        description: "Path to a fixture JSON file under fixtures/"
        required: false
        default: "fixtures/basic.json"

permissions:
  contents: read

env:
  # MATRIX_FIXTURE lets the act harness override the fixture per test case.
  MATRIX_FIXTURE: ${{ github.event.inputs.fixture || 'fixtures/basic.json' }}

jobs:
  pester:
    name: Run Pester unit tests
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Run Pester
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          $r = Invoke-Pester -Path ./New-BuildMatrix.Tests.ps1 -Output Detailed -PassThru
          if ($r.FailedCount -gt 0) { throw "Pester failures: $($r.FailedCount)" }

  generate:
    name: Generate matrix from fixture
    needs: pester
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    outputs:
      size: ${{ steps.gen.outputs.size }}
      strategy: ${{ steps.gen.outputs.strategy }}
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Show fixture
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          Write-Host "Using fixture: $env:MATRIX_FIXTURE"
          if (-not (Test-Path $env:MATRIX_FIXTURE)) {
            throw "Fixture file not found: $env:MATRIX_FIXTURE"
          }
          Get-Content $env:MATRIX_FIXTURE -Raw | Write-Host

      - name: Generate matrix
        id: gen
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          . ./New-BuildMatrix.ps1
          $cfg = Get-Content $env:MATRIX_FIXTURE -Raw
          $strategy = New-BuildMatrix -Config $cfg
          $json = $strategy | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 20 -Compress
          Write-Host "MATRIX_JSON=$json"
          Write-Host "MATRIX_SIZE=$($strategy.size)"
          # Emit a clearly-delimited block the harness can grep for.
          Write-Host "::group::strategy"
          Write-Host "BEGIN_STRATEGY"
          Write-Host $json
          Write-Host "END_STRATEGY"
          Write-Host "::endgroup::"
          "size=$($strategy.size)"     | Out-File -FilePath $env:GITHUB_OUTPUT -Append
          "strategy=$json"             | Out-File -FilePath $env:GITHUB_OUTPUT -Append

content.text: The workflow itself succeeded for all 3 cases — the problem is just my harness's JSON extraction not stripping act's leading `| ` prefix. Let me fix and re-run.

input.old_string:
# act prefixes each captured stdout line with "| ". Strip those before parsing.
                $jsonRaw = $m.Groups[1].Value -replace '(?m)^\s*\|\s*', '' -replace '(?m)^\s*\[[^\]]+\]\s*', ''

content.text:
Everything green. Summary:

- **`New-BuildMatrix.ps1`** — PowerShell module with `New-BuildMatrix` (Cartesian expansion, include/exclude semantics matching GitHub Actions, max-parallel/fail-fast/max-size validation) and a CLI wrapper.
- **`New-BuildMatrix.Tests.ps1`** — 18 Pester tests, all passing, written TDD-style across 7 scenarios (cartesian, exclude, include, parallel/fail-fast, max-size, JSON I/O, errors).
- **`.github/workflows/environment-matrix-generator.yml`** — push/PR/schedule/workflow_dispatch triggers, two jobs (`pester` → `generate`), `shell: pwsh` throughout, passes `actionlint`.
- **`fixtures/{basic,with-include-exclude,overcap}.json`** — three test cases.
- **`Run-ActTests.ps1`** — harness that runs each fixture through `act push --rm` in an isolated temp git repo, appends delimited output to `act-result.txt`, and asserts exit codes, "Job succeeded" lines, and exact strategy values (size 4 / 8, fail-fast and max-parallel matching expectations); also verifies actionlint and workflow structure.
- **`act-result.txt`** — 312 lines of delimited act output for all 3 cases.

result:
Everything green. Summary:

- **`New-BuildMatrix.ps1`** — PowerShell module with `New-BuildMatrix` (Cartesian expansion, include/exclude semantics matching GitHub Actions, max-parallel/fail-fast/max-size validation) and a CLI wrapper.
- **`New-BuildMatrix.Tests.ps1`** — 18 Pester tests, all passing, written TDD-style across 7 scenarios (cartesian, exclude, include, parallel/fail-fast, max-size, JSON I/O, errors).
- **`.github/workflows/environment-matrix-generator.yml`** — push/PR/schedule/workflow_dispatch triggers, two jobs (`pester` → `generate`), `shell: pwsh` throughout, passes `actionlint`.
- **`fixtures/{basic,with-include-exclude,overcap}.json`** — three test cases.
- **`Run-ActTests.ps1`** — harness that runs each fixture through `act push --rm` in an isolated temp git repo, appends delimited output to `act-result.txt`, and asserts exit codes, "Job succeeded" lines, and exact strategy values (size 4 / 8, fail-fast and max-parallel matching expectations); also verifies actionlint and workflow structure.
- **`act-result.txt`** — 312 lines of delimited act output for all 3 cases.
